---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new skill or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
<!-- What workflow are you trying to improve? What's painful today? -->

## Proposed solution
<!-- Describe what you want. New skill? Enhancement to an existing skill? Lib change? -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why this one is better. -->

## If proposing a new skill
- [ ] The skill solves a domain problem (not just a CLI wrapper)
- [ ] Multi-account / multi-environment is meaningful for this domain
- [ ] Mutating operations have safety gates
- [ ] Description is precise so Claude routes correctly

## Token budget impact
<!-- Estimated SKILL.md size. Skills should target 100-150 lines. -->

## Additional context
<!-- Use case examples, links to relevant API docs. -->
